requirement_topic.en: EMC and KC Marking for Power Banks with Integrated Electronics
requirement_topic.zh: 集成电子元件移动电源的EMC与KC标志
requirement_topic.zht: 整合電子元件行動電源的EMC與KC標誌

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, and display) are electronic apparatus subject to South Korea's electromagnetic compatibility regime in addition to KC Safety Certification. KC-EMC requirements are administered by the RRA (National Radio Research Agency) under MSIT, based on the Radio Waves Act, and require KC-EMC Registration of Conformity (적합등록) using Korean EMC standards (KN 32 for emissions and KN 35 for immunity, the Korean adoptions of CISPR 32 / CISPR 35). If the power bank incorporates wireless functionality (e.g., Qi wireless charging output, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, NFC), it additionally requires RRA radio Conformity Certification (적합인증) — the KC radio mark — under the Radio Waves Act for the relevant frequency bands. A single combined KC mark with a certification/registration number is affixed; the documentation must cover both EMC and, where applicable, radio.
summary.zh: 移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出及显示屏的便携式电池组）作为电子装置，除KC安全认证外，还须满足韩国电磁兼容制度。KC-EMC要求由MSIT下属RRA（国立电波研究院）依据《电波法》管理，须使用韩国EMC标准（辐射方面KN 32、抗扰度方面KN 35，即韩国采纳的CISPR 32/CISPR 35）进行KC-EMC符合登记（적합등록）。若移动电源包含无线功能（如Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙电量指示、NFC），则还须依据《电波法》就相关频段取得RRA无线符合认证（적합인증）——即KC无线标志。产品粘贴单一组合KC标志及认证/登记编号；文件须涵盖EMC及适用时的无线部分。
summary.zht: 行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出及顯示幕的便攜式電池組）作為電子裝置，除KC安全認證外，還須滿足韓國電磁相容制度。KC-EMC要求由MSIT下屬RRA（國立電波研究院）依據《電波法》管理，須使用韓國EMC標準（輻射方面KN 32、抗擾度方面KN 35，即韓國採納的CISPR 32/CISPR 35）進行KC-EMC符合登記（적합등록）。若行動電源包含無線功能（如Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙電量指示、NFC），則還須依據《電波法》就相關頻段取得RRA無線符合認證（적합인증）——即KC無線標誌。產品粘貼單一組合KC標誌及認證/登記編號；文件須涵蓋EMC及適用時的無線部分。

standards_or_laws: Radio Waves Act (전파법) — Republic of Korea, basis for KC-EMC and radio certification administered by RRA / MSIT
KN 32 — Korean EMC emission standard (adoption of CISPR 32) for multimedia/IT equipment
KN 35 — Korean EMC immunity standard (adoption of CISPR 35) for multimedia/IT equipment
KC-EMC Registration of Conformity (적합등록) and Conformity Certification (적합인증) — RRA
KN 301 489 series — EMC for radio equipment (where wireless functions are present)

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products are governed by GB/T 9254.1-2021 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of information technology equipment — Part 1: Class B equipment) for emissions, and GB/T 17618-2015 (Limits and methods of measurement of immunity characteristics of information technology equipment) for immunity. Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval under MIIT administration, which is specific to Chinese radio frequencies and protocol implementations. Chinese GB/T EMC test reports and SRRC approval are NOT recognised under South Korea's KC-EMC registration or RRA radio conformity pathway.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求：辐射方面适用GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法——第1部分：B类设备），抗扰度方面适用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技术设备抗扰度特性限值和测量方法）。含无线功能的产品须依据工业和信息化部的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国无线电频段和协议实现。中国GB/T EMC检测报告及SRRC核准在韩国KC-EMC登记或RRA无线符合路径下不被认可。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求：輻射方面適用GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技術設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法——第1部分：B類設備），抗擾度方面適用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技術設備抗擾度特性限值和測量方法）。含無線功能的產品須依據工業和信息化部的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國無線電頻段和協議實現。中國GB/T EMC檢測報告及SRRC核准在韓國KC-EMC登記或RRA無線符合路徑下不被認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for products with wireless functions sold in China

gap.en: Power banks with integrated electronics (USB charging IC, protection circuit, display, or wireless function) must demonstrate conformity with Korea's KC-EMC requirements via RRA Registration of Conformity (적합등록) using KN 32 / KN 35, separate from KC Safety Certification. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC approvals may support engineering review but are not accepted as standalone evidence for the Korean registration. For wireless products: (1) the product must operate within Korea-permitted frequency bands and power limits under the Radio Waves Act; (2) RRA radio Conformity Certification (적합인증) is required, not just EMC registration; (3) the combined KC mark and Korean certification/registration number must be displayed. Many Chinese power banks designed for the domestic market may use frequency channels, power levels, or wireless protocol variants (e.g., specific Qi profiles) that require re-testing for Korean RRA compliance.
gap.zh: 含集成电子元件的移动电源（USB充电IC、保护电路、显示屏或无线功能）须经RRA使用KN 32/KN 35进行符合登记（적합등록），证明符合韩国KC-EMC要求，与KC安全认证分开。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC核准可支持工程审查，但不能作为韩国登记的独立充分证据。对于无线产品：（1）产品须在《电波法》允许的韩国频段及功率限值内运行；（2）须取得RRA无线符合认证（적합인증），而非仅EMC登记；（3）须标示组合KC标志及韩国认证/登记编号。许多面向中国市场设计的移动电源可能使用的频道、功率水平或无线协议变体（如特定Qi配置）需经重新测试方可满足韩国RRA合规。
gap.zht: 含整合電子元件的行動電源（USB充電IC、保護電路、顯示幕或無線功能）須經RRA使用KN 32/KN 35進行符合登記（적합등록），證明符合韓國KC-EMC要求，與KC安全認證分開。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC核准可支持工程審查，但不能作為韓國登記的獨立充分證據。對於無線產品：（1）產品須在《電波法》允許的韓國頻段及功率限值內運行；（2）須取得RRA無線符合認證（적합인증），而非僅EMC登記；（3）須標示組合KC標誌及韓國認證/登記編號。許多面向中國市場設計的行動電源可能使用的頻道、功率水平或無線協議變體（如特定Qi配置）需經重新測試方可滿足韓國RRA合規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — KC-EMC Registration of Conformity (적합등록) under the Radio Waves Act applies to power banks with integrated electronics placed on the Korean market; wireless variants additionally require RRA radio Conformity Certification (적합인증); the KC mark with certification/registration number must be displayed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Power banks are electronic apparatus subject to Korea's KC-EMC regime under the Radio Waves Act, requiring RRA Registration of Conformity (적합등록) to KN 32 / KN 35; wireless variants additionally require RRA radio Conformity Certification (적합인증). Chinese GB/T 9254 reports and SRRC approval are not standalone Korean conformity evidence. The KC documentation must cover KC Safety Certification, KC-EMC, and — where applicable — radio obligations, with the combined KC mark and Korean certification number displayed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 移动电源属于电子装置，须依据《电波法》适用韩国KC-EMC制度，须经RRA依据KN 32/KN 35进行符合登记（적합등록）；无线型号还须取得RRA无线符合认证（적합인증）。中国GB/T 9254报告及SRRC核准不能作为独立的韩国符合性证据。KC文件须涵盖KC安全认证、KC-EMC及适用时的无线义务，并标示组合KC标志及韩国认证编号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 行動電源屬於電子裝置，須依據《電波法》適用韓國KC-EMC制度，須經RRA依據KN 32/KN 35進行符合登記（적합등록）；無線型號還須取得RRA無線符合認證（적합인증）。中國GB/T 9254報告及SRRC核准不能作為獨立的韓國符合性證據。KC文件須涵蓋KC安全認證、KC-EMC及適用時的無線義務，並標示組合KC標誌及韓國認證編號。

source.publisher: RRA — National Radio Research Agency (MSIT), Republic of Korea
